name: nginx error log
sampleLines: 2024/04/28 04:02:03 [error] 12345#67890: *42 open() "/usr/share/nginx/html/missing.html" failed (2: No such file or directory), client: 10.0.0.5, server: example.com, request: "GET /missing.html HTTP/1.1", host: "example.com"

2024/04/28 04:02:04 [warn] 12345#67890: *43 upstream server temporarily disabled while connecting to upstream, client: 1.2.3.4, server: api.example.com, request: "POST /v1/orders HTTP/2.0", upstream: "http://10.0.0.10:8080/v1/orders", host: "api.example.com", referrer: "https://example.com/checkout"
2024/04/28 04:02:06 [info] 12345#67890: *44 client closed connection while waiting for request, client: 10.0.0.6, server: 0.0.0.0:443
description: Written from scratch against nginx OSS sources (BSD-2-Clause). The format is produced by `ngx_log_error_core` in src/core/ngx_log.c: 'YYYY/MM/DD HH:MM:SS [level] PID#TID: *CID message[, client: IP[, server: HOST[, request: "..."[, upstream: "..."[, host: "..."[, referrer: "..."]]]]]]'. Severity tokens come from nginx's err_levels[] array.
